response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song "FOCUS" at 00:00 with text indicating "Music: KIRA". Searched for "KIRA FOCUS lyrics". Found full lyrics in search result. 2. Identified song "DARK ARIA <LV2>" at 03:16 with text indicating "Music: 薄野弘之". Searched for "薄野弘之 DARK ARIA LV2 lyrics". Found full lyrics in search result. 3. Mapped scenes based on song start and end times. 4. Constructed JSON with requested structure, ensuring proper escaping and formatting.
response.global_summary: The video consists of two distinct musical performances by the VTuber IRyS, showcasing her dancing and singing on a stage. The first performance is the song "FOCUS", followed by the song "DARK ARIA <LV2>".

scenes.description: IRyS performs "DARK ARIA <LV2>" while standing at a microphone stand under spotlight on stage. The on-screen text identifies the music as being by 薄野弘之 (Hiroyuki Sawano).
